core_question: How does platform moderation fail to account for local histories of political violence, and what is the concept of normative dislocation that explains this failure? Specifically, how did platform moderation during Brazil's 2022 presidential elections neglect local historical contexts of political vi

themes: Journalistic discourse and agenda-setting in relation to tech industry framing; Critical political economy of Big Tech and labor precarity; Sociotechnical imaginaries of AI inevitability versus industry vulnerability
core_question: How did journalistic discourse frame the 2023-2024 tech industry mass layoffs and what does this reveal about the shifting relationship between Big Tech, the press, and narratives of artificial intelligence?

themes: Mediated visibility and visual paradox in digital environments; Disability and sensory politics in platform-based communication; Media practices and self-representation of marginalized groups on short-video platforms
